title: Support typedef overwrites with unpacked dimensions and in classes

features.name: typedef shadowing in nested module scope
features.description: Code should include a typedef declaration that shadows (overwrites) a same-named typedef defined in an outer/higher scope, using a different type for the inner declaration

features.name: typedef with unpacked dimensions shadowing outer typedef
features.description: Code should include a typedef with unpacked array dimensions that shadows a typedef of the same name declared in an enclosing scope

features.name: typedef shadowing inside class scope
features.description: Code should include a typedef declared inside a class body that shadows a same-named typedef from an outer package or module scope
